title: tauschia ehrenbergii
intro: Tauschia ehrenbergii, also known as the Mountain Angelica, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Tauschia ehrenbergii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
